Name: SOCRadarMSSP
Author: SOCRadar - integration@socradar.io
Description: The [SOCRadar MSSP](https://socradar.io/) solution for Microsoft Sentinel provides multi-tenant incident management for Managed Security Service Providers. Centralize security operations across multiple customer tenants while maintaining data isolation.
WorkbookBladeDescription: This solution installs a workbook to visualize SOCRadar alarm data across all managed customer tenants.
HuntingQueryBladeDescription: This solution installs hunting queries to help investigate SOCRadar alarm data across multiple tenants.
PlaybooksBladeDescription: This solution installs MSSP-specific playbooks to automate alarm import and sync for multi-tenant environments.
WorkbookDescription: SOCRadar MSSP Dashboard provides unified visibility into alarms from all managed customer tenants, with filtering and drill-down capabilities per tenant.
PlaybookDescription: Multi-tenant alarm import with dynamic company registry and parallel processing.
Syncs closed incidents back to appropriate SOCRadar tenants with classification mapping.
Creates infrastructure for multi-tenant audit logging and telemetry.
